name: fred-md

env_axis.name: regime
env_axis.shift_mechanism: published regime shifts: GFC 2007-09, COVID 2020, ZLB monetary period; vintage-as-env is a distinct axis

ood_protocol.name: fred-regime-shift
ood_protocol.ref: McCracken & Ng 2016 JBES; Goulet Coulombe et al. 2022 JAE

facts: 134+ monthly US macro series 1959–present + ALFRED vintage archive (real-time snapshots by release date).
hypotheses: {pre-2008, 2008-2020, post-2020} are three distinct envs rather than two, because the post-2020 period reflects a persistent shift and not merely a transient COVID episode.
Vintage-as-env (released-by date) is categorically different from measurement-date-as-env — the same data under a different shift type.
intuitions: Goulet Coulombe 2022 and Medeiros 2021 likely have follow-ups extending to post-2024 data.
A nowcasting literature using the ALFRED vintage archive likely exists.
Macroeconomic foundation-model work from 2024-25 may exist, if any.
unknowns: Whether 'regime' is a discrete latent state (recession / expansion / ZLB) or a continuous latent variable cannot be determined — the data does not commit, but every method does, and there is no established label for 'implicit regime labeling chosen by the method, not the data'.
Series-selection (the curated 134) is itself a representational commitment that biases all comparisons.
epistemic_state.boundary: C=0; aggregation-decomposition (national inflation → sector inflation) is implicit in the variable list, not exposed as a compositional handle.

materialization_status: current-md.csv materialized (correct URL: research.stlouisfed.org/econ/mccracken/fred-databases/current-md.csv, not the S3 path). ALFRED vintage archive deferred.
